name: ork
description: The Complete AI Development Toolkit — 103 skills, 36 agents, 131 hooks for full-stack development.

webhookUrl.description: Webhook endpoint URL for usage reports and notifications

webhookToken.description: Authentication token for webhook endpoint (stored in keychain)

notebookLmToken.description: NotebookLM auth token for /ork:release-sync (stored in keychain)
